flowers.name: Lotus
flowers.description: Rising from murky waters to bloom in untainted beauty, the Lotus represents resilience, spiritual awakening, and serenity.

flowers.name: Rose
flowers.description: Timeless and sophisticated, the Rose is a symbol of deep passion, classic elegance, and a hint of protective mystery.

flowers.name: Sunflower
flowers.description: Always chasing the sun, the Sunflower exudes pure joy, unwavering loyalty, and a brilliant, infectious optimism.

flowers.name: Lavender
flowers.description: With its soothing scent and delicate hue, Lavender embodies grace, tranquility, and a healing, thoughtful presence.

flowers.name: Orchid
flowers.description: Exotic and rare, the Orchid is a symbol of unique beauty, extraordinary strength, and refined luxury.

flowers.name: Cherry Blossom
flowers.description: Brief but breathtaking, the Cherry Blossom celebrates the beauty of the present moment and the cycle of renewal.

flowers.name: Daisy
flowers.description: Simple and genuine, the Daisy represents innocence, new beginnings, and a cheerful, honest outlook on life.

flowers.name: Lily
flowers.description: Majestic and proud, the Lily symbolizes majesty, purity of heart, and an aura of regal sophistication.

flowers.name: Jasmine
flowers.description: Small but with a powerful, intoxicating fragrance, Jasmine represents modest beauty and sensual strength.

flowers.name: Marigold
flowers.description: Vibrant and hardy, the Marigold thrives in the heat, representing passion, creativity, and a determined spirit.

flowers.name: Poppy
flowers.description: Striking and imaginative, the Poppy is a symbol of deep dreams, remembrance, and artistic flair.

flowers.name: Tulip
flowers.description: Perfectly balanced and colorful, the Tulip represents perfect love and a well-rounded, adaptive personality.
